\[
w=(p,q,\dots,q),\quad q=\frac{1-p}{n-1},\quadc=\frac{p-a}{n-1},\ b=\frac{1-\delta-a}{n-1},\ d=\frac{\delta+2a-2p}{(n-1)(n-2)}.
\]
\[
a(n-1)(\delta+2a-2p)^{2}=(n-2)^{2}(1-\delta-a)(p-a)^{2},\qquad a d^{2}=b c^{2}.
\]
\[
\text{Example: }n=7,\ p=0.4,\ \delta=0.2,\ a^\star\approx 0.353428842011978,\ R\approx 0.913448102948938.
\]
